channel.title: SHTG Daily Digest — Weiss Lab
channel.description: Daily research digest on severe hypertriglyceridemia, ANGPTL3, ANGPTL4, APOC3, and lipoprotein lipase. Auto-generated from PubMed for Ethan Weiss.
channel.itunes:author: Ethan Weiss

item.title: SHTG Digest — Friday April 24, 2026
item.description: No top-tier journal hits this week. Second-tier highlights: plozasiran (APOC3 siRNA) cuts recurrent acute pancreatitis by 83% in FCS patients (PALISADE post-hoc); olezarsen meta-analysis confirms 48% TG reduction across 4 RCTs; ANGPTL3 inhibitor meta-analysis shows 73% remnant cholesterol reduction; two Nature Reviews Cardiology reviews on ANGPTL3 and ApoC-III implementation.
item.itunes:title: SHTG Digest — Friday April 24, 2026

item.title: SHTG Digest — Tuesday April 28, 2026
item.description: The long-awaited 2026 ACC/AHA Dyslipidemia Guideline drops today in *Circulation*, while concurrent evidence on plozasiran, ANGPTL3 inhibition, and ApoC-III blockade reinforces that RNA-based triglyceride therapies are reshaping the clinical landscape for SHTG and residual cardiovascular risk.
item.itunes:title: SHTG Digest — Tuesday April 28, 2026

item.title: SHTG Digest — Wednesday April 29, 2026
item.description: A landmark week — the ACC/AHA released the first major U.S. dyslipidemia guideline since 2018, plozasiran's PALISADE post-hoc shows it prevents recurrent pancreatitis in very severe hypertriglyceridemia (and now has its first regulatory approval), and two new Nature Reviews Cardiology pieces frame the next phase for ApoC-III– and ANGPTL3-directed therapies.
item.itunes:title: SHTG Digest — Wednesday April 29, 2026

item.title: SHTG Digest — Thursday April 30, 2026
item.description: A thin but consequential week — the new 2026 ACC/AHA dyslipidemia guideline lands in *Circulation* and explicitly folds hypertriglyceridemia into the cholesterol-management framework, while *NEJM* publishes a correspondence cluster pressure-testing the pancreatitis-risk findings of the pivotal olezarsen (APOC3) trial.
item.itunes:title: SHTG Digest — Thursday April 30, 2026

item.title: SHTG Digest — Friday May 1, 2026
item.description: A thin original-research week, but two genuinely high-impact items: the new joint 2026 ACC/AHA dyslipidemia guideline (which now formally addresses hypertriglyceridemia and Lp(a) alongside LDL-C), and three published letters in NEJM debating the CORE-TIMI 72a/b olezarsen trial — including the Marston/Bergmark/Sabatine reply.
item.itunes:title: SHTG Digest — Friday May 1, 2026
